query:
SELECT id, productName, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice, notes
FROM supplier_product_cost_map
WHERE supplier = 'SasBoss'
AND (
  productName LIKE '%Agent Web App%' OR productName LIKE '%Call Queue%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Call Recording%' OR productName LIKE '%Go Integrator%' OR
  productName LIKE '%ICall%' OR productName LIKE '%Premium Call Queue%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Reception%' OR productName LIKE '%Supervisor Web App%' OR
  productName LIKE '%UC Payd%' OR productName LIKE '%UCXcel - Call%' OR
  productName LIKE '%UCXcel Basic Queue%' OR productName LIKE '%UCXcel Premium%' OR
  productName LIKE '%UCXcel Webex%' OR productName LIKE '%Voicemail%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Webex Softphone%' OR productName LIKE '%Resi Voicemail%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Directed Call%' OR productName LIKE '%Enhanced Call Queue%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Go Operator%' OR productName LIKE '%Softphone Add-On%'
)
ORDER BY productName;

FROM supplier_product_cost_map

  productName LIKE '%UCXcel Basic Queue%' OR productName LIKE '%UCXcel Premium%' OR
  productName LIKE '%UCXcel Webex%' OR productName LIKE '%Voicemail%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Webex Softphone%' OR productName LIKE '%Resi Voicemail%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Directed Call%' OR productName LIKE '%Enhanced Call Queue%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Go Operator%' OR productName LIKE '%Softphone Add-On%'
)
ORDER BY productName;
